title: HS/OS Artistic Dirt, Dirty Censorship - Writing Sex in Contemporary Chinese Literature
further_info: Recommended Reading The following literary works will be read and and discussed, some in full, some in parts: Jin Ping Mei 金瓶梅词话 (published 1617, for the first time commercially published in the PRC in 1985/1992, censored until today) Jia Pingwa 贾平凹: Ruined City 废都 (published 1993, banned 1993, unbanned 2009) Wang Xiaobo 王小波: The Golden Age 黄金时代 (published 1991 in Taiwan, 1994 in the PRC, 1995 briefly banned, 1997 unbanned) Yan Lianke 阎连科: Serve the People! 为人民服务 (published 2005, banned 2005) Wei Hui 卫慧: Shanghai Baby 上海宝贝 (published 1999, banned 2000) Mian Mian 棉棉: Candy 糖 (published 2000, banned 2000, republished 2009) Hong Ying 虹影: K. The Art of Love 英国情人 (published in the PRC in 2002, lawsuit and trial in the same year, 2003 censored)
